name: Aspirin
uses: Pain relief, fever, heart attack prevention
warning: May cause bleeding. Not for children with viral infections

name: Ibuprofen
warning: Risk of GI bleeding, kidney damage

name: Ketorolac
warning: Max 5 days use, severe GI risk

name: Rofecoxib
warning: Withdrawn due to heart attack risk

name: Valdecoxib
warning: Withdrawn due to serious adverse effects

name: Metformin
side_effects: GI upset, B12 deficiency, lactic acidosis risk
warning: Monitor kidney function, avoid contrast dye

name: Pioglitazone
side_effects: Weight gain, fluid retention, heart failure
warning: Heart failure risk, monitor for edema

name: Rosiglitazone
warning: Restricted availability due to cardiac risks

name: Acarbose
warning: GI side effects, hypoglycemia with other drugs

name: Lisinopril
warning: Can cause dangerous hyperkalemia, pregnancy risk

name: Atenolol
uses: High blood pressure, heart disease, angina

name: Metoprolol
uses: High blood pressure, heart attack, anxiety

name: Propranolol
uses: High blood pressure, angina, migraine, anxiety

name: Minoxidil
uses: Severe high blood pressure, hair loss

name: Ezetimibe
warning: Muscle pain with statins, liver issues

name: Warfarin
uses: Blood clots, atrial fibrillation, valve replacement

name: Dabigatran
uses: Atrial fibrillation, blood clots, PE prevention

name: Apixaban
uses: Atrial fibrillation, blood clots, PE prevention

name: Rivaroxaban
uses: Atrial fibrillation, blood clots, PE prevention

name: Edoxaban
warning: Bleeding risk, reduced dose for low weight

name: Heparin
uses: Acute blood clots, DVT/PE, coronary thrombosis

name: Dipyridamole
uses: Coronary vasodilation stress test, stroke prevention

name: Amoxicillin
uses: Common infections, strep throat, ear infection

name: Clarithromycin
uses: Respiratory and skin infections, H. pylori
side_effects: GI upset, metallic taste, QT prolongation

name: Doxycycline
uses: Respiratory infections, acne, Lyme disease, malaria

name: Fluoroquinolone - Ciprofloxacin
side_effects: Tendon rupture, QT prolongation, C. difficile

name: Metronidazole
uses: Anaerobic infections, C. difficile, parasites, BV

name: Vancomycin
uses: MRSA, C. difficile, serious gram-positive infections

name: Clindamycin
uses: Acne, anaerobic infections, MRSA, PCP prophylaxis
side_effects: GI upset, yeast infection, C. difficile
warning: C. difficile risk, risk with lincosamides

name: Ethambutol
side_effects: Optic neuritis, color blindness, peripheral neuropathy

name: Famciclovir
side_effects: Headache, nausea, confusion in renal impairment

name: Ribavirin
uses: RSV, HCV (with other agents), hemorrhagic fever

name: Interferon Alfa-2b
side_effects: Flu-like symptoms, depression, bone marrow suppression

name: Protease Inhibitor - Ritonavir
side_effects: GI upset, hepatotoxicity, drug interactions (potent enzyme inhibitor)

name: Protease Inhibitor - Indinavir
warning: Kidney stones, high fluid intake needed

name: Entry Inhibitor - Maraviroc
warning: Liver damage risk, requires tropism testing

name: Entry Inhibitor - Enfuvirtide
side_effects: Injection site reactions, eosinophilia, allergic reactions

name: FQRNAI - Naloxone
warning: Acute withdrawal, readministration may be needed

name: H2 Blocker - Cimetidine
side_effects: Mental confusion, gynecomastia, potent drug interactions

name: Proton Pump Inhibitor - Omeprazole
uses: GERD, peptic ulcer, ZES, HP eradication
warning: Long-term use risks fractures, nutrient deficiency

name: Proton Pump Inhibitor - Pantoprazole
uses: GERD, peptic ulcer, ZES, stress ulcer prophylaxis

name: Proton Pump Inhibitor - Esomeprazole
uses: GERD, peptic ulcer, ZES, stress ulcer prophylaxis

name: Sucralfate
side_effects: Constipation, aluminum toxicity in renal failure

name: Antiemetic - Prochlorperazine
side_effects: Tardive dyskinesia, NMS, dystonia, neuroleptic malignant

name: Laxative - Magnesium Citrate
side_effects: Cramping, diarrhea, hypermagnesemia in renal failure

name: Laxative - Lubricant - Mineral Oil
side_effects: Lipid pneumonia if aspirated, nutrient malabsorption

name: Antidiarrheal - Bismuth Subsalicylate
side_effects: Black stools, salicylate toxicity, Reye's syndrome risk

name: Appetite Suppressant - Phentermine
side_effects: Insomnia, anxiety, elevated heart rate, hypertension

name: Antihistamine - Cetirizine
side_effects: Drowsiness (less than other antihistamines), dry mouth

name: Corticosteroid - Triamcinolone
side_effects: Hyperglycemia, infection, joint damage with injection

name: Corticosteroid - Halcinolone
side_effects: Skin atrophy with prolonged use, infection risk

name: Biologic - Tumor Necrosis Factor Inhibitor - Infliximab
uses: Rheumatoid arthritis, Crohn's, psoriasis, other TNF-mediated
dosage: 3-10mg/kg IV at weeks 0, 2, 6, then every 8 weeks

name: Biologic - Tumor Necrosis Factor Inhibitor - Etanercept
Biologic - TNF Inhibitor - Adalimumab
uses: Rheumatoid arthritis, Crohn's, ulcerative colitis, psoriasis
dosage: 40mg subcutaneous every other week or weekly

name: Biologic - TNF Inhibitor - Golimumab
uses: Rheumatoid arthritis, psoriasis, ulcerative colitis, ankylosing

name: Biologic - IL-6 Inhibitor - Tocilizumab
uses: Rheumatoid arthritis, giant cell arteritis, COVID-19
dosage: 4-8mg/kg IV every 4 weeks or 162mg subcutaneous weekly

name: Biologic - JAK Inhibitor - Baricitinib
side_effects: Infection, herpes zoster, elevated lipids, hepatotoxicity

name: Biologic - JAK Inhibitor - Tofacitinib
side_effects: Infection, herpes zoster, elevated lipids, malignancy

name: Biologic - B-cell Depleting - Rituximab
side_effects: Infection, progressive multifocal encephalopathy, infusion reactions
